mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assets (user_id, name, initial_amount, asset_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{initialAmount}, #{assetType})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, initial_amount, asset_type, created_at FROM assets WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE assets SET name = #{name}, initial_amount = #{initialAmount}, asset_type = #{assetType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
